CustomField.description: Eligibility rule: prerequisite criteria that must be met before this criteria's incentive is calculated.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: If set, the salesperson must achieve the minimum % on this prerequisite criteria before qualifying for incentive on the current criteria. Example: S&D incentive requires achieving at least 90% of Revenue target. Leave blank if no prerequisite is needed.
CustomField.label: Prerequisite Criteria
